# catalystcenter_fabric_multicast (Resource)

Manages Fabric Multicast configuration at a fabric site level. This resource configures the multicast replication mode (headend replication or native multicast) for a fabric site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "catalystcenter_fabric_multicast" "example" {
  fabric_id        = "5e6f7b3a-2b0b-4a7d-8b1c-0d4b1cd5e1b1"
  replication_mode = "HEADEND_REPLICATION"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fabric_id` (String) ID of the fabric site where multicast is configured
- `replication_mode` (String) Replication Mode deployed in the fabric site
  - Choices: `NATIVE_MULTICAST`, `HEADEND_REPLICATION`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import catalystcenter_fabric_multicast.example "<fabric_id>"
```
